title: 4kids dubs Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: 4kids dubs Evangelion             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Apr 05, 2010 3:24 am I recently thought how funny it would be if 4kids tried to dub and broadcast Evangelion. Here's how some scenes would play out in my head: Shinji drops Kaworu instead of card crushing him. He visits Kaworu in the hospital, and there are tears on hand instead of semen. B00b shot is removed. Instead of the sex scene, the shot at the beginning of episode 22 is used and has Asuka replaced with Misato for some INTENSE HAND HOLDING , with Kaji being voiced by DAN GREEN . How would an Evangelion 4kids dub be done if you got to direct? Besides, I haven't done anything here in a long time. Knock yourselves out.

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Mon Apr 05, 2010 3:51 am Asuka and Shinji's famous kiss scence would be removed and replaced with some very sexy hand holding.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Apr 05, 2010 4:06 am god, I can't even imagine what that travesty would be like...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Apr 05, 2010 7:05 am Simple: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Mon Apr 05, 2010 10:07 am NOOO! STEP AWAY, 4KIDS! YOU ALMOST RUINED ONE PIECE (thanks to Funimation's rescue) BUT YOU WON'T BE TOUGHING EVANGELION! YOU MUST DIE!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Apr 05, 2010 10:12 am tomrule123 wrote: STEP AWAY, 4KIDS!

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Apr 05, 2010 10:54 am I don't think much of anything after episode 12 or so would be airable at all unless they somehow hacked together "new" episodes using even more recycled footage than the actual show. GasmaskAvenger wrote: god, I can't even imagine what that travesty would be like...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 05, 2010 11:39 am duexmachina wrote: Asuka and Shinji's famous kiss scence would be removed and replaced with some very sexy hand holding.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon Apr 05, 2010 12:35 pm esselfortium wrote: I don't think much of anything after episode 12 or so would be airable at all unless they somehow hacked together "new" episodes using even more recycled footage than the actual show.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Apr 05, 2010 12:47 pm They wouldn't be referred as "angels". Either monsters, beasts, or aliens. Most likely aliens.

[]: Re: 4kids dubs Evangelion             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Apr 05, 2010 1:09 pm Combs wrote: I recently thought how funny it would be if 4kids tried to dub and broadcast Evangelion. Here's how some scenes would play out in my head:

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Mon Apr 05, 2010 1:16 pm You guys are crazy. Dan Green would voice Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Apr 05, 2010 1:27 pm Hmm...while I wouldn't watch it, the thought of Mike Pollock as either Gendo or Kiel does have a certain appeal.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon Apr 05, 2010 2:35 pm How would they dub EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Apr 05, 2010 2:55 pm They wouldn't even bother trying.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Mon Apr 05, 2010 2:56 pm The angels would be rewritten to be alien robots and would be controlled over something from another series using syndication techniques like with Voltron or Robotech. Adam would be considered the "Prototype". Lilith, Leliel, Bardiel, and Tabris would be gone entirely. Instead of eating Zeruel there would be a weird mind screw moment. Armisael would be just a giant sticky bomb with the conversation between it, Rei 2, and Rei 1 all cut. The series would end with eps 5 and 6 and Ramiel is an alien mothership.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Mon Apr 05, 2010 3:19 pm They could actually leave a lot of the 1st season intact. After episode 14 though things would get tricky and awful.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Apr 05, 2010 3:27 pm It would be called Neon Hurr Durr and the Evangelions would compete in dance competitions against the angels where they would just loop images from episode nine over and over again. It would also end on an awkward note at episode 13.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Mon Apr 05, 2010 3:37 pm 4Kids dub of EVA? There's always Puchi-EVA... That'll work...

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Mon Apr 05, 2010 3:58 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: You do know it was a hypothetical question, right?
